compatible_devices.compatible_series: FC Series, FC-E Series, SP Series
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, timing schedule, sunrise/sunset simulation, stage-based PPFD control
compatible_devices.notes: Only for 2024+ new version FC, FC-E, and SP3000; older non-smart models not compatible; iConnectu plugs into the light's RJ12 port and adds WiFi/Bluetooth

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: iFresh MarsPro Add-On Pack (includes iFresh fan + temperature sensor)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Wind speed adjustment, environmental monitoring via temperature sensor
compatible_devices.notes: Add-On Pack specifically listed as 'for New Version iFresh Inline Duct Fan, Temperature Sensor and iConnectu Controller'; iConnectu alone is LED-only; no humidifier, CO2, or heater control
